languages.text: {n}Вкрадчивый голос Данрока раздается в вокс-бусине.{/n} "Ваша Светлость! Нижайше прошу о немедленной аудиенции на мостике. Необходимо обсудить ситуацию, сложившуюся на одном из ключевых миров протектората. Ваш почтенный предок, Себериан, пожелал решить ее единолично, однако я считаю своим святым долгом оповестить вас о произошедшем. Уверяю, это не отнимет много времени".

{n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."
languages.original_text: {n}Вкрадчивый голос Данрока раздается в вокс-бусине.{/n} "Ваша Светлость! Нижайше прошу о немедленной аудиенции на мостике. Необходимо обсудить ситуацию, сложившуюся на одном из ключевых миров протектората. Ваш почтенный предок, Себериан, пожелал решить ее единолично, однако я считаю своим святым долгом оповестить вас о произошедшем. Уверяю, это не отнимет много времени".

We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, has deemed to visit the planet in person, and I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."

languages.text: {n}ダノークの絹のような声があなたの通信玉に響く:{/n}「御主人様！私は深くお詫び申し上げます。急ぎますが、ブリッジで御面会を願い申し上げます。保護領の重要な世界で発生した事態について、御祖先であるセベリアン卿が一人で解決しようとされていますが、私は御報告を怠ることはできません。御時間を取られることは少ないと確信しております。」
languages.original_text: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."

traits.locale_text: {n}ダノークの絹のような声があなたの通信玉に響く:{/n}「御主人様！私は深くお詫び申し上げます。急ぎますが、ブリッジで御面会を願い申し上げます。保護領の重要な世界で発生した事態について、御祖先であるセベリアン卿が一人で解決しようとされていますが、私は御報告を怠ることはできません。御時間を取られることは少ないと確信しております。」

languages.text: {n}你听到丹罗克丝滑的声音从通讯珠里传来：{/n}“大人！我谦卑而急切地请求在舰桥上与您会面。我们必须讨论一下属地某个关键世界上的情况。您那位尊贵的先祖，塞贝里安大人，想独自解决此事，可我认为还是应当通知您，这是我的神圣职责。我向您保证，我绝不会占用您太多时间。”
languages.original_text: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到丹罗克丝滑的声音从通讯珠里传来：{/n}“大人！我谦卑而急切地请求在舰桥上与您会面。我们必须讨论一下属地某个关键世界上的情况。您那位尊贵的先祖，塞贝里安大人，想独自解决此事，可我认为还是应当通知您，这是我的神圣职责。我向您保证，我绝不会占用您太多时间。”

languages.text: {n}Mikro telsizden Danrok'un ipeksi sesini duyuyorsun.{/n} " {mf|Lord|Leydi}Hazretleri! Büyük bir aceleyle ve alçakgönüllülükle sizinle köprüde görüşmeyi talep ediyorum. Protektoranın kilit dünyalarından birindeki durumu konuşmalıyız. Saygıdeğer atanız Lord Seberian, bu sorunu tek başına çözmek istiyor ancak yine de sizi bilgilendirmeyi kutsal bir görev saydım. Bunun vaktinizi fazla almayacağına sizi temin edebilirim."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mikro telsizden Danrok'un ipeksi sesini duyuyorsun.{/n} " {mf|Lord|Leydi}Hazretleri! Büyük bir aceleyle ve alçakgönüllülükle sizinle köprüde görüşmeyi talep ediyorum. Protektoranın kilit dünyalarından birindeki durumu konuşmalıyız. Saygıdeğer atanız Lord Seberian, bu sorunu tek başına çözmek istiyor ancak yine de sizi bilgilendirmeyi kutsal bir görev saydım. Bunun vaktinizi fazla almayacağına sizi temin edebilirim."

languages.text: {n}Oyes la sedosa voz de Danrok por tu cuenta de comunicaciones:{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Le ruego humildemente que me conceda una audiencia urgente en el puente. Debemos hablar de una situación que afecta a uno de los mundos clave del protectorado. Su estimado antepasado, lord Seberian, quiere resolverlo personalmente, pero es mi deber sagrado informarle. Puedo asegurarle que no le llevará mucho tiempo».
languages.original_text: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Oyes la sedosa voz de Danrok por tu cuenta de comunicaciones:{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Le ruego humildemente que me conceda una audiencia urgente en el puente. Debemos hablar de una situación que afecta a uno de los mundos clave del protectorado. Su estimado antepasado, lord Seberian, quiere resolverlo personalmente, pero es mi deber sagrado informarle. Puedo asegurarle que no le llevará mucho tiempo».

languages.text: {n}Vous entendez la voix doucereuse de Danrok dans votre communicateur :{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ! Je demande humblement à ce que vous m'accordiez au plus vite une audience sur la passerelle. Nous devons parler de la situation sur l'un des mondes clés de votre protectorat. Votre vénérable ancêtre, le seigneur Seberian, souhaite résoudre le problème seul, mais j'ai pensé qu'il était de mon devoir de vous en informer. Je vous assure que cela ne prendra qu'un instant. »
languages.original_text: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous entendez la voix doucereuse de Danrok dans votre communicateur :{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ! Je demande humblement à ce que vous m'accordiez au plus vite une audience sur la passerelle. Nous devons parler de la situation sur l'un des mondes clés de votre protectorat. Votre vénérable ancêtre, le seigneur Seberian, souhaite résoudre le problème seul, mais j'ai pensé qu'il était de mon devoir de vous en informer. Je vous assure que cela ne prendra qu'un instant. »

languages.text: {n}Du hörst Danroks seidene Stimme in deinem Voxstecker:{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! "Ich bitte demütig und in großer Eile um eine Audienz mit Euch auf der Brücke. Wir müssen ein Problem auf einer Schlüsselwelt des Protektorats besprechen. Euer geschätzter Ahnherr, Lord Seberian, will es selbst lösen, aber ich hielt es für meine heilige Pflicht, Euch zu informieren. Ich versichere Euch, es wird nicht lange dauern."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear Danrok's silken voice in your comm-bead:{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I humbly and with great haste request an audience with you on the bridge. We must discuss a situation on one of the protectorate's key worlds. Your esteemed ancestor, Lord Seberian, wishes to resolve it single-handedly, yet I thought it my sacred duty to notify you. I can assure you that this will not take much of your time."
